## Project Overview

`e2e-fixture-app` is a minimal synthetic Node.js/Express fixture application used for end-to-end testing of the appsec-advisor pipeline. It declares `express@4.19.2`, `lodash@4.17.10`, and `sequelize@6.37.1` as dependencies but contains no application source code beyond a `Dockerfile` and `package.json`. It runs as a containerized Node.js 20 service on port 3000.

## Team Context

No team context, security contact, or asset classification provided.

## Asset Classification

**Tier: Unknown** — no business context available. Treating as generic web application for threat modeling purposes.

## Compliance Scope

Requirements loaded from OWASP baseline (`.requirements.yaml`). Categories in scope:
- CAT-WEB: Web & Frontend Security (8 requirements: WEB-001..WEB-008)
- CAT-EH: Error Handling & Security Events (3 requirements: EH-001..EH-003)
- CAT-HN: System Hardening (4 requirements: HN-001..HN-004)
- CAT-AC: Authentication & Access Control (6 requirements: AC-001..AC-006)
- CAT-IV: Input Validation & Data Handling (6 requirements: IV-001..IV-006)
- CAT-DP: Data Protection & Cryptography (7 requirements: DP-001..DP-007)
- CAT-SC: Supply Chain & Dependency Security (6 requirements: SC-001..SC-006)
- CAT-LM: Security Logging & Monitoring (6 requirements: LM-001..LM-006)
- CAT-IF: Infrastructure & Container Security (8 requirements: IF-001..IF-008)
- CAT-LLM: AI / LLM Security (present in requirements — not applicable to this fixture app)

Total: 25+ requirements from OWASP Top 10 / Cheat Sheet Series.

## Architecture Notes

- **Runtime**: Node.js 20 (alpine), Express 4.19.2, Sequelize 6.37.1 (ORM), Lodash 4.17.10
- **Deployment**: Single Docker container, port 3000, no reverse proxy, no TLS configuration visible
- **Dockerfile**: Runs as root (no USER directive), no read-only filesystem, no capability dropping
- **No source code found**: `server.js` referenced in Dockerfile CMD but absent from repo — minimal fixture
- **No lockfile**: `package-lock.json` / `yarn.lock` absent — dependency pinning gap

None found.

None declared.

## Security Posture Signals (from manifest scan)

- `lodash@4.17.10` — known prototype pollution CVEs (CVE-2019-10744, CVE-2020-8203)
- `express@4.19.2` — recent, no critical known CVEs at assessment date
- `sequelize@6.37.1` — recent; raw query capability warrants injection scrutiny
- No auth middleware declared
- No security-related npm packages (helmet, express-rate-limit, jsonwebtoken, bcrypt, etc.)
- No `.env` files found; no secrets committed
- Dockerfile runs as root (IF-002 violation)
- No lockfile (SC-002 gap)
